    1. displayCreatePost(Stage, User, Post)

Class ViewCreatePost

java.lang.Object
guiCreatePost.ViewCreatePost
public class ViewCreatePost extends Object

Title: ViewCreatePost Class.

Description: A form page used for BOTH creating a new post and editing an existing one. When an existing Post is passed to displayCreatePost(), the form fields are pre-populated and the save button is labelled "Update Post"; otherwise it says "Create Post". Reusing one View for two operations (create vs. edit) reduces code duplication. The alternative — separate ViewCreatePost and ViewEditPost classes — would be nearly identical and twice as hard to maintain. Input validation error messages are shown in a red label beneath the form rather than via popup dialogs, which is less disruptive for the user.

Copyright: CSE 360 Team Project © 2025

  • Method Details

    • displayCreatePost

      public static void displayCreatePost(javafx.stage.Stage ps, User user, Post post)

      Method: displayCreatePost(Stage ps, User user, Post post)

      Description: Opens the form. Pass post=null for a new post, or pass an existing Post to pre-populate the form for editing.

      Parameters:
      ps - the JavaFX Stage
      user - the logged-in user
      post - null → create mode; non-null → edit mode
